h82f796e3g8082g431cg8d69g364e2ac8d80a: You prove intolerable. We are done.
h671ddfe8g5daeg4286ga859g22d9cda6b8f2: You're leaving...? Surely we can talk this over.
hd8252841gcd2eg4cedga461g07064c35f6d0: I have suffered one parasite; I can no longer suffer the other.
he18e5402g3e4dg434agb1d6g021ef68171b2: I'd figured you a cretin. To think I overestimated you.
h172fff5eg7fe4g4fb2g9346gd626c0ee56e3: I see... thank you, all the same. Your service was most welcome.
h48fc3affgbd74g46fagb7d7g72527bc13c59: You call me intolerable? Be on your way then, and good riddance.
